scene: Ecstatic teen Byte sitting at his desk on a sunny afternoon.

subjects.description: Byte, a gangly teen-stage pixel art blob with big expressive happy eyes and ecstatic expression
subjects.action: sitting happily with hands on the desk

subjects.description: Wooden desk with centered oversized silver laptop, wooden trophy shelf above with one golden 10-day trophy on left and one leafy green plant on right, Chicago skyline window on left, exactly one food bowl on floor to the right

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: warm afternoon sunlight streaming from skyline window
background: clean room with skyline window, trophy shelf, floor with food bowl
composition: foreground Byte at desk, background wall with shelf, skyline view in window
